description: Five safe workflows for live smoke testing the workflow execution engine. Update workflow_ids to match the IDs in your tenant if they differ.

workflows.name: E2E Test - File Read
workflows.purpose: Canonical safe workflow: reads a small text file and stores its content in a variable. No external side-effects.
workflows.notes: Known-safe baseline. If this fails, do not run the others.

workflows.name: Set Variable Chain
workflows.purpose: Two Set Variable nodes — verifies variable substitution and step-to-step state passing.
workflows.notes: Fill in workflow_id with the actual ID from your tenant before running.

workflows.name: Conditional Branch - True Path
workflows.purpose: Comparison that evaluates true; verifies the pass-connection branch executes.
workflows.notes: Fill in workflow_id from your tenant. Should run the 'yes' branch.

workflows.name: Loop over Folder Files (dry)
workflows.purpose: Folder Selector + Loop + Set Variable inside loop, no destructive ops. Verifies loop body executes for each item.
workflows.notes: Verifies loop accounting; uses tests_v2/fixtures/workflows/loop_input/ as the folder source.

workflows.name: Pause/Resume Smoke
workflows.purpose: Workflow with an artificial delay that allows the test to pause and resume mid-flight.
workflows.notes: Use during WFE-7 to test pause/resume.

predicates.is_int_ge_1: (isinstance(v, int) or (isinstance(v, str) and v.isdigit())) and int(v) >= 1

operator_runbook: Before running, edit each workflow's workflow_id with the matching row from `GET /api/workflows/list`.
If a workflow doesn't exist yet, import the JSON definitions from tests_v2/fixtures/workflows/ via /save/workflow.
Each test is independent — if WFE-285 fails, stop and triage.
Treat any 5xx response as a hard failure; rerun once with verbose logging to capture the trace.
If the engine is configured with USE_WORKFLOW_EXECUTOR_SERVICE=true, the proxy adds one round-trip but the contract stays the same.
